description: Phase 1 extension of v1.0. Adds per-rule provenance (regulator, jurisdiction, source_url, regulatory_refs, effective_from, effective_until) and dimension_parameters block. No behavioral changes from v1.0.

changelog.change: Phase 1: added provenance fields and dimension_parameters to all rules. Source URLs and regulatory_refs hand-authored from primary regulatory documents. snapshot_hash is null for all hand-authored entries (no automated fetch occurred).

REJECT.description: Hard fail. Customer must not be onboarded or must be offboarded. No score threshold can override a Reject.

REVIEW.description: Manual review required. Customer is held pending human decision. Analyst proposes, Manager approves.

PASS_WITH_NOTES.description: No hard fails or review triggers, but score indicates weaknesses. Proceed with documented caveats.

PASS.description: Fully compliant. No triggers hit. Score meets or exceeds threshold.

hard_reject_rules.name: Confirmed Sanctions Match
hard_reject_rules.description: Customer appears on a sanctions list with confirmed hit status. Non-negotiable rejection.

hard_reject_rules.name: No Identity Documents On File
hard_reject_rules.description: Customer has zero identity documents on file. Cannot establish identity.
hard_reject_rules.policy_reference: KYC Policy 2.1 — Identity Verification Minimum Standard

hard_reject_rules.name: All Identity Documents Rejected
hard_reject_rules.description: All identity documents submitted have been rejected as invalid. Identity cannot be established.
hard_reject_rules.policy_reference: KYC Policy 2.1 — Identity Verification Minimum Standard

hard_reject_rules.name: No Screening Record
hard_reject_rules.description: No AML screening record exists for this customer. Screening is mandatory before onboarding.

review_rules.name: Unresolved Sanctions Match
review_rules.description: Customer has a sanctions match that is not confirmed but has not been cleared as false positive. Requires analyst investigation.

review_rules.name: All Identity Documents Expired
review_rules.description: Customer has no currently valid identity documents. Re-verification required.

regulatory_refs: JMLSG Part I 5.3.15 — Ongoing Monitoring of Customer Documents

review_rules.name: Stale AML Screening
review_rules.description: Most recent AML screening is older than the threshold defined in dimension_parameters.screening.max_screening_age_days. Re-screening required before disposition can be confirmed.

regulatory_refs: Wolfsberg Private Banking Principles 2012 s.6.1 — Periodic Review

review_rules.name: Identity Verification Pending
review_rules.description: Identity verification is in progress but not yet completed. Cannot approve until resolved.

regulatory_refs: FinCEN CDD Rule 31 CFR 1010.230(a) — General Requirements
FATF Rec 10 — CDD Before Establishing Relationship

review_rules.name: Beneficial Ownership Below Minimum Data Quality
review_rules.description: Beneficial ownership data is present but critically incomplete. UBO cannot be confirmed.
review_rules.policy_reference: KYC Policy 3.1 — Beneficial Ownership Minimum Standard

regulatory_refs: FinCEN CDD Rule 31 CFR 1010.230(d) — Beneficial Ownership Identification
FATF Rec 24 — Transparency of Legal Persons

review_rules.name: Critical Data Quality Failure
review_rules.description: Core customer record fields are missing or corrupt. Record integrity is in question.

score_thresholds.note: These thresholds only apply when no Reject or Review triggers are hit. Score still shown for context on all dispositions.
